news.title: 视频平台提升招生和学生支持服务
news.summary_en: Explore the latest video platform from When in Culture, empowering international students to feel confident and connected to their university.
news.author: The PIE News team
news.original_title: Watch: a video platform elevating admissions and student support
news.summary_cn: 一款创新的视频平台正在改变国际教育机构与潜在学生和在读学生的互动方式。该平台通过个性化的视频内容提升招生体验，同时为学生提供更高效的支持服务，帮助院校建立更强的全球连接。

news.title: 美国F-1签证持续下滑未见反弹，国际教育界担忧加剧
news.summary_en: After dramatic declines during peak visa issuance months, September 2025 saw no relief for US colleges and prospective students, as stakeholders warn of severe and uneven sector impacts.
news.author: Polly Nash
news.original_title: No rebound for the US as F-1 visa slump deepens
news.summary_cn: 美国F-1学生签证发放量持续下降，即使在传统签证发放高峰期也未出现反弹。国际教育利益相关者警告称，这种趋势将对美国高等教育产生严重且不均衡的影响，可能导致部分院校面临财政压力和国际学生多元化程度下降。
